# Templates

## Selecting a Template

Use `--template <template-key>` with `markbind init`:

```bash
markbind init --template minimal
```

## Supported Template Keys

| Template | Key | Typical use case |
|---|---|---|
| Default | `default` | General docs with common navigation structure |
| Minimal | `minimal` | Fast lightweight starting point |
| Project | `project` | Product/project docs with structured sections |
| Portfolio | `portfolio` | Personal/project showcase site |

## Notes

- If `--template` is omitted, MarkBind uses `default`.
- You can combine template selection with site initialization root paths.

## User Guide Source

- <https://markbind.org/userGuide/templates.html>
